title: Vežba 61

questions.text: Koji je ispravan način za postavljanje pitanja o postojanju nečega koristeći there is ili there are?

answers.answer: Is there a meeting scheduled for today?
Are there the new designer in the office?
answers.feedback: Zapamti da koristiš is there za jedinstvo i are there za množinu. Ispravan oblik je Is there a new designer in the office?

answers.answer: Is there any chairs in the meeting room?
answers.feedback: Chairs je u množini, pa je pravilna forma Are there any chairs in the meeting room?

answers.answer: Are there a new designer in the office?
answers.feedback: Ovo pitanje je o jednoj osobi, pa bi trebalo da koristi is there umesto are there. Ispravan format je Is there a new designer in the office?

description:
Is there na are there koristi se na početku pitanja da pita o postojanju ili prisutnosti nečega.

  • Is there koristi se za jedninu imenice, kao što je u Is there a solution?

  • Are there koristi se za množinsku imenicu, kao što je u Are there any questions?
